required_complexity_patterns.notes: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute

reference_templates.title: Table layout form
reference_templates.notes: Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Table layout

reference_templates.notes: micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Micro1 Q labels

reference_templates.title: Output with range
reference_templates.notes: Years of experience via range input with output element display
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Output range

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Reference DOM (Table layout form): Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells Reference DOM (Micro1 Q label pattern): micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator Reference DOM (Output with range): Years of experience via range input with output element display Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: duplicate-name-attrs, aria-labelledby-hidden, pill-yes-no, custom-combobox, label-wraps-deep. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: two-column grid without card wrapper. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Table layout form; Micro1 Q label pattern; Output with range.
